summary: Video. A subtitled compilation of 2006 Minnesota Senate debate footage shows candidates including Amy Klobuchar and Carla Johnson discussing border security. It is archival TV footage with caption overlays and no music or song.
notable_text: 2006 MINNESOTA SENATE DEBATE; 700-MILE FENCE ON; THOUSANDS OF; GONE WAY DOWN; AMY KLOBUCHAR (DFL) U.S. Senate Candidate; CARLA JOHNSON
